user_query: I'm organizing a company sports day to promote teamwork and employee well-being. I need activities with MET values and nutritional analysis of healthy snacks.

TaskList.description: Compile a list of team-building activities suitable for a company sports day along with their MET (Metabolic Equivalent of Task) values.
Calculate the calories burned by each participant based on the activities selected in Subtask 1.
Gather nutritional analysis for various healthy food items to provide as snacks during the event.
Finalize the food and snack arrangements based on the nutritional analysis from Subtask 3.
